title: Vanilla PvP Improved
description: This pack changes Minecraft's textures to improve PvP performance.
body:
This pack is designed to improve PvP performance by making key visuals clearer and less distracting during combat. It features low fire, which reduces the size of fire on your screen so it doesn’t block your view when you’re burning, allowing you to keep track of opponents more easily. It also includes smaller items, meaning held item models take up less space, helping reduce visual clutter and making it easier to see enemies and important movements around you.

Combined with these tweaks, the pack helps you maintain better visibility, react faster, and stay focused in intense PvP situations, giving you a cleaner and more competitive gameplay experience.
